scripts.build: bun build src/index.tsx  --compile --outfile kode24 --target bun --minify --external react --external @opentui/react --external @opentui/core --external zod --external @better-fetch/fetch
scripts.build:darwin:arm64: bun build src/index.tsx  --compile --outfile kode24-darwin-arm64 --target bun-darwin-arm64 --minify --external react --external @opentui/react --external @opentui/core --external zod --external @better-fetch/fetch
scripts.build:darwin:x64: bun build src/index.tsx  --compile --outfile kode24-darwin-x64 --target bun-darwin-x64 --minify --external react --external @opentui/react --external @opentui/core --external zod --external @better-fetch/fetch
scripts.build:linux:arm64: bun build src/index.tsx  --compile --outfile kode24-linux-arm64 --target bun-linux-arm64 --minify --external react --external @opentui/react --external @opentui/core --external zod --external @better-fetch/fetch
scripts.build:linux:x64: bun build src/index.tsx  --compile --outfile kode24-linux-x64 --target bun-linux-x64 --minify --external react --external @opentui/react --external @opentui/core --external zod --external @better-fetch/fetch
scripts.start: bun run build && bun x serve dist
